status.sql: SELECT sf."repo_name", sf."ref", sf."path", sc."content" FROM "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_FILES" sf JOIN "GITHUB_REPOS"."SAMPLE_CONTENTS" sc ON sf."id" = sc."id" WHERE sf."path" ILIKE '%.py' OR sf."path" ILIKE '%.r' OR sf."path" ILIKE '%.R' OR sf."path" ILIKE '%.Rmd' OR sf."path" ILIKE '%.rmd' OR sf."path" ILIKE '%.ipynb' /* Filter for relevant file types */
